title: Watchtower Alert Kernel: Minimal Rank Decomposition
strategies: fiber baseline: one rank-1 primitive per nonzero mode-3 fiber (~a*b terms)
fixed-mode slice factorization: exact CR/rref rank-factor each frontal slice (good only when the planted low-rank axis is mode 3)
best-of-three-modes slice factorization: slice along every axis, keep the cheapest -- exploits the planted low-rank axis wherever it is
open frontier: cross-slice recombination / true tensor rank (NP-hard, no proven optimum)
